features.name: Graph Knowledge Digest
features.title: Temporal graph personal knowledge digest (Obsidian-friendly Markdown)
features.description: Aggregate temporal graph entities/events/facts over a time window into an Obsidian-friendly Markdown digest under reports/ (symlinked, never committed). Default path makes zero model calls; summary=true makes at most one role-neutral Chat provider call with fallback. Source PRD: tasks/prd-graph-knowledge-digest.md; Ralph PRD: scripts/ralph/prd.json (branch ralph/graph-knowledge-digest, 6 stories).
scope: temporalgraph manager read-only Digest aggregation with limits
Pure Markdown renderer: YAML frontmatter + 7 fixed H2 sections (role-neutral)
POST /api/v1/graph/digest writing reports/graph-digest-<start>_<end>.md, metadata-only JSON response
Optional summary=true single Chat provider call with graceful degradation (mock-tested only)
CLI chatlog report graph --days/--summary/--base-url via the HTTP endpoint
Closed-loop verification on the live 127.0.0.1:5030 service without disturbing the graph queue
done_criteria: All 6 stories in scripts/ralph/prd.json pass with evidence
go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph and go build ./... pass
Digest file verified by path/size/mtime/section count only; no chat-derived content printed
git status shows no graph-digest-*.md entries; digest run does not increase graph failed count
evidence: US-001..US-006 all passes=true in scripts/ralph/prd.json; per-story evidence in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
go build ./... exit 0; go test ./internal/chatlog/temporalgraph ./internal/chatlog/semantic ./internal/chatlog/dailyreport all ok (2026-06-12)
node scripts/check-root-harness.mjs 80/80 PASS (2026-06-12)

Closed loop re-verified 2026-06-12 16:44 on live 127.0.0.1:5030: go run . report graph --days 7 exit 0; reports/graph-digest-2026-06-05_2026-06-12.md size 3932, mtime current run, 7 H2 sections, frontmatter has window_start/window_end
Idempotent overwrite confirmed (second run exit 0, same file, mtime advanced, file count 1)
graph failed count 267 before == 267 after, pending 0 unaffected; git status has no graph-digest-*.md report artifacts (docs/graph-digest.md is the intentional new doc)
features.next_step: PRD complete (6/6). Optional follow-ups: one real summary=true run (user-triggered, quota-sensitive, verify summary_used + file size only); commit the digest code when user asks.

features.name: Semantic MiniMax M3 Config

Switching Chat provider away from MMX resets both MiniMax-M3 and MiniMax-M2.7 to the target provider default.
The web config page suggests MiniMax-M3 and uses it when MMX provider defaults are synced.
Focused tests pass without running quota-sensitive model calls.

features.name: Ralph Auto Merge Branch
features.title: Ralph branch lifecycle: work branch per run, auto-merge on full pass
features.description: ralph.py reads prd.json branchName to create/switch a work branch at startup so story commits land on the branch; when all stories pass (zero blocked) it auto-merges --no-ff back into the base branch. Blocked stories skip the merge; conflicts abort safely keeping the work branch; never pushes. RALPH_AUTO_MERGE env toggle (default on). Source PRD: tasks/prd-ralph-auto-merge-branch.md; Ralph PRD: scripts/ralph/prd.json (branch ralph/auto-merge-branch, 4 stories).
scope: ensure_work_branch() startup branch create/switch with bootstrap-placeholder skip

BLOCKED: frontend DB panel recovery closed loop (US-005, depends US-004)

Graph digest non-summary verification without disturbing queue (US-007)

Root state + done recording (US-009)
BLOCKED: end-to-end recovery acceptance (US-010, depends US-004)
